news.title: Is Wall Street heading towards a massive crash by 2026-end? Here's what history may be hinting at
news.description: Strong US stock gains in 2026 are being overshadowed by historical midterm election volatility, AI valuation concerns and bearish warnings. While corrections are common in midterm years, analysts expect markets to recover strongly after elections, supported by favourable historical trends.

news.title: Rupee slides past 96/USD to one-month low as oil climbs; RBI likely intervenes
news.description: On Tuesday, the Indian rupee fell to its lowest level in over a month, influenced by soaring oil prices and ongoing tensions in the Middle East. news.title: 12 stocks held by 100+ MFs in June surged up to 105% in just over 6 months
news.description: Mutual funds' favourite stocks have rewarded investors handsomely in CY26. ETMarkets' analysis shows that 12 stocks held by over 100 mutual fund schemes each have surged between 50% and 105% so far this year, reflecting strong institutional conviction and robust market momentum.

news.title: Why stock market fell today? Rising oil prices among key factors behind Rs 3 lakh crore wealth erosion
news.description: Benchmark indices Sensex and Nifty fell sharply on Tuesday as soaring crude oil prices, renewed rate hike fears, weak Q1 earnings from HCL Tech, a weaker rupee and fragile global cues triggered broad-based selling.

news.description: Martin Pelletier: Investors focused on oil prices may be missing stresses that could end up weighing on equity valuations. Find out more.

news.title: Türkiye posts current account deficit of $1.46 billion in May
news.description: Türkiye’s current account posted a deficit of $1.46 billion in May, exceeding market expectations, according to data released on July 13 by the country’s central bank.

news.title: Retail inflation rose to 4.4% in June
news.description: Retail inflation rose to 4.4% in June, driven by high silver jewellery prices and rising food costs.

news.title: Kuniko fires up drill bit to chase bonanza NSW gold hit
news.description: Kuniko Limited has resumed drilling at the company’s NSW Commonwealth project, following up on bonanza silver-gold hits from a successful first campaign. Assays are due in September.
